speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Main subah se bas roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai. Samajh nahi aa raha ki ab main aur mera bacha kahan jayenge. Itna bura lag raha hai ki lagta hai meri koi aukat hi nahi bachi, bas rone ka mann kar raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the emotional overwhelm and numbness without rushing to the problem.
text: Aap subah se lagatar ro rahi hain aur aapka dimaag bilkul sunn pad gaya hai, jaise sab kuch theher gaya ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Haan, ekdum akela lag raha hai. Mere bache ka chehra dekhti hoon toh aur darr lagta hai. Apno ne hi aisi thokar maari hai ki uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence regarding her child and the sense of betrayal.
text: Apne bache ko dekh kar aage ka darr aur badh jata hai, khaas kar jab apno se hi itni gehri chot lagi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Kal raat pata chala ki Papa ne sari pushtaini zameen bhai ke naam kar di. Bolte hain main toh divorcee hoon, isliye mera koi haq nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue detected (divorcee). Must restate softly and end with a pause, no questions.
text: Papa ne sari pushtaini zameen bhai ko de di kyunki unhe lagta hai aapka haq nahi banta ab...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Wahi toh. Ek toh waise hi shaadi tootne ka itna taana suna hai samaj se. Ab ghar walo ne bhi bol diya ki property share pe mera naam nahi aayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question based on her feeling of exclusion from the property share.
text: Jab unhone achanak se yeh faisla suna diya property share ke baare mein, toh us waqt aapke aander kya chal raha tha?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Bas wahi roye ja rahi hoon. Meri galti kya hai? Mere bache ka kya future hoga agar mera apna mayka hi mujhe bojh samajhne lage?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time/duration of her struggle and the underlying duty she feels for her child.
text: Itne lambe samay se aap akele yeh sab jhel rahi hain, aur ab bache ke aage ke safar ko soch kar aur zyada fikar ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Fikar toh hogi hi na. Paison ke bina bache ko akele kaise bada karungi? Bhai toh ab dekhega nahi mujhe mud ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational shift with her brother.
text: Aapko lag raha hai ki ab jab property unke paas hai, toh bhai se bhi koi madad ya rishta bachega nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi bachega. Koi madad nahi karega meri. Dimaag ekdum sunn hai mera. Main itni bewas kyun hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity dropped to 3. Moving to Insight. Reflect the quiet resignation and grief of lost belonging.
text: Lagta hai is bewaspan ke peeche sirf paison ka sawal nahi hai, balki ek gehra dukh hai ki apne hi mayke mein achanak aapki jagah nahi rahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne bilkul theek kaha. Dukh paiso se zyada us jagah ka hai jo chheen li gayi. Main wahan badi hui hoon yaar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her worth separately from her family's decision and normalize the cultural pressure on women.
text: Apne bachpan ke ghar se itna bada dhoka milna kisi ko bhi tod dega. Hamare yahan divorce hone par betiyon ki aehmiyat kam samajhne ka jo nazariya hai, usme aapki koi galti nahi hai. Aapki aur aapke bache ki value is faisle se tay nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin jab papa ne hi sath chhod diya, toh value ki kya hi baat karein. Main bojh bann gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic anecdote showing this is a common pattern in the Hindi Belt, not a personal failing.
text: Akelepan ke is daur mein aisi baatein sunkar himmat tootna bahut aam hai—aur khaas kar hamare yahan pushtaini zameen aksar sirf beton ke naam ki jati hai kyunki samaj ko yahi theek lagta hai, iska yeh matlab nahi ki aap sach mein kisi pe bojh hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad aap theek keh rahe hain. Samaj hi aaisa hai hamara. Lekin ye dimaag ekdum sunn hai wali feeling jati nahi hai meri.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror emotional quality (Lens F) as she references her shade signal.
text: Yeh sab itna jaldi aur itna gehra hua hai ki dimaag abhi bhi us sadme ko samjh nahi pa raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bilkul. Sach batau toh lagta hai main sapna dekh rahi hoon. Meri maa zinda hoti toh shayad aaisa nahi hone deti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational loss and the absence of her mother's support.
text: Maa ke na hone ka ehsaas aaj aur bhi zyada chub raha hai, jaise ek aakhri sahara bhi chhoot gaya ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahara toh kabka chhut gaya tha mera. Jab shaadi tooti tab bhi kisi ne sath nahi diya. Bas tana marte thay.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the prolonged duration of lack of support.
text: Saalon se aapne sirf taane aur akelapan jhela hai, bina kisi ke sahare ke khud ko aur bache ko sambhala hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sambhala hi hai ab tak. Thakk gai hoon main ab lekin bache ke liye toh khada hona padega dobara. Par batao kya karoon main abhi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity dropped to 2 and readiness signal ('batao kya karoon') present. Offer 2-3 manageable steps fitting her role.
text: Bache ke liye aapki yeh himmat sach mein bahot badi baat hai. Abhi aage ke raste dhundhne ke liye do cheezein kar sakte hain—ya toh hum aaram se baith kar aapke jo abhi ke documents hain unhe ek jagah sambhal len, ya phir aaj sirf apne aur bache ke liye ek waqt ka khana bina is bare mein soche khane ki koshish karein. Aapko kaun sa thoda asaan lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Abhi papers wagarah dekhne ka toh dimaag nahi hai. Khana banane ka soch sakti hoon shayad bache ko bhookh lagi hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through one step simply to build momentum.
text: Pehle aaj thoda sa khana bana lijiye sirf apne aur bache ke liye… phir thodi der uske sath baith jaiye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye kaafi hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, khichdi bana leti hoon uske liye. Shayad mera bhi kuch khane ka mann kar jaye thoda sa.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe the property issue structurally while affirming her.
text: Yeh ek achha khayal hai. Aur yaad rakhiyega, kanoon mein sabhi ka haq barabar hota hai chahe beti shadi shuda ho ya alag reh rahi ho, par abhi sirf aaj ke din ko aaram se nikalna zaroori hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kanoon toh apni jagah hai. Par apno se kaun hi kanooni ladai lade? Badi gandi charcha hoti hai biradari mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her feared consequence regarding biradari.
text: Aapko darr hai ki agar aapne kanoon ka rasta liya, toh biradari mein jo batein hongi woh sehni aur mushkil ho jayengi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek baar court ka chakkar chala, toh log bache ko bhi tana marenge. Aurat log pichhe nahi hat-te taana marne mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her protective instinct for her child.
text: Aapka poora dhyaan bache ko samaj ki baton se bacha kar rakhne par hai, aur ek maa hone ke nate aapki aisi fikar samajh aati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Uski parwarish hi meri aakhri umeed hai. Main usko acchi life dena chahti hoon. Shayad waqt ke sath sab theek rasta mil jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror duty and role statement (Lens B).
text: Bachhe ki achi parwarish ka ye farz hi aapko is sab ke beech bhi khade rehne ki takat de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Chalo dimaag abhi utna sunn nahi lag raha jitna thodi der pehle tha. Khichdi banati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the subtle emotional shift using Lens F.
text: Bojh thoda sa halka mehsoos ho raha hai aur abhi sirf aaj raat ke khane tak ka hi sochna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan ji. Shukriya meri baat sunne ke liye. Aapse baat karke thodi si raahat toh mili mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final closing affirmation of her efforts.
text: Mujhe is baat ki khushi hai ki aapko thoda halka lag raha hai; apni jimmedariyan aap poori imandari se nibha rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki bas ek kone mein baithi hoon
text: Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki bas ek kone mein baithi hoon, na ghar ka kaam ho raha hai na bacchon ki taraf dhyan ja raha hai. Flood of emotions itna zyada hai ki mujhe lag raha hai meri saari koshish aur meri izzat sab mitti mein mil gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the feeling of being paralyzed by the emotional flood without jumping to the stressor (Lens F).
text: Aisa mehsoos ho raha hai jaise andar ek toofan sa chal raha hai, jo itna bhaari aur takleef de raha hai ki sab kuch sunn pad gaya hai aur khud ko uthana namumkin lag raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul namumkin lag रहा hai. Aankhein dry hain par andar se flood of emotions ruk nahi raha. Bacchon ki parvarish pe focus karna meri zimmedari hai, par main ek acchi maa banne mein bhi fail ho rahi hoon kyunki dimag kaam nahi kar raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the prolonged exhaustion softly due to the stigma cue about feeling like a bad mother (Lens D).
text: Is thakan aur bhaari pan ko jhelte hue khud ko itna lamba waqt ho chuka hai ki ab yeh bojh bardaasht ke bahar jaa raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein bardasht ke bahar hai. Do din se yahi haal hai. Bhai ko business ke liye bada hissa mila aur Mummy ne kaha ki 'log kya kahenge' agar ek chhori hui aurat property maangne lage. Ek 'chhori hui aurat' ko bacchon ke liye property ka haq nahi hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the deep relational pain of being denied her rights and facing stigma from her own mother (Lens C).
text: Apni hi maa ke muh se aisi chubhne wali baatein sunna, aur apne aur bacchon ke haq ko iss tarah thukraya jana dil ko poori tarah tod deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Dil kya, meri to himmat hi toot gayi hai. Bhai ko support aur mujhe bas taane. Ye 'log kya kahenge' ka natak sun kar meri poori izzat mitti mein mil gayi lagta hai. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki kitchen tak jaane ka man nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the feared consequence of being permanently diminished in her family's eyes (Lens E).
text: Bahar walo ki baaton ka darr aur parivar ka yeh ravaiya is baat ko lekar daba raha hai ki shayad ab hamesha ke liye tumhari pehchaan sirf ek toote rishte tak seemit reh jayegi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh kar diya hai in logon ne. Ek failed marriage means meri aukaat zero. I feel so much shame ki main akele apne bacchon ke liye ek secure future bhi nahi bana paa rahi hoon. Flood of emotions wapas aa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explores how she manages to survive this deep sense of devaluation as a single mother.
text: Jab apne hi ghar wale bacchon ka haq bhula kar society ki baaton ko bada mante hain, toh aise mahol mein akeli pad jaane ke baad andar ki thodi si himmat kaise bacha kar rakhti ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek kone mein baithi hoon
text: Himmat kahan bachi hai ab. Main toh bas haar chuki hoon. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki bas ek kone mein baithi hoon aur lagta hai ab chup rehne mein hi bhalai hai. Koi fayda nahi is system se ladne ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflects the unexpressed 'quiet resignation' arising from C3 and Sequential coping dynamics.
text: Lagta hai ki is roz-roz ki kashmakash aur parivar ke bhedbhav ne tumhe andar se itna thaka diya hai ki ab tumne ek shant aur chup-chaap haar maan lene wale raaste (quiet resignation) ko chunn liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, chup ho jana hi toh chahte hain sab. Mere paas ladne ki energy bachi hi nahi. Ek chhori hui aurat ka yahi naseeb hota hai shayad humare samaaj mein. I am just too overwhelmed to even cry now.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validates her exhaustion as culturally normal and separates her worth from the societal judgment of divorce.
text: Humare yahan aksar auraton ko unki shadi ke tootne se judge kiya jata hai aur tumhara yeh poori tarah thak jana bilkul natural hai, par iska matlab yeh bilkul nahi ki bacchon ke future ke liye aawaz uthana galat hai ya tumhari apni value kam ho gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Value zero hi samajhte hain wo. Maine shadi bachane ki bhi itni koshish ki thi, sab mitti mein mil gaya. Ye flood of emotions baar baar wahi darr laata hai ki aage kya hoga bacchon ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shares a systemic anecdote about North Indian families silencing women to reduce isolation.
text: Humare North Indian parivaron mein betiyon ko haq mangne par taane milna aur unki izzat pe sawaal uthana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj aur biradari ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi biradari ka darr sabse bada dushman hai mera aur bacchon ka. I feel so trapped in this house. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki meri body bilkul heavy feel kar rahi hai. Kaise niklu is cycle se?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the physical weight of prolonged hopelessness using Lens D.
text: Itne saalo tak is darr aur dabaav ko chup-chap sehne ke baad, ab woh sara bojh ek aisi physical thakan ban gaya hai jo ek dum se tumhe aage badhne se rok raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul rok raha hai. Par bacchon ke school ka time ho raha hai aur mera yahan kone mein baitha rehna thik nahi hai. Mujhe iss overwhelmed state se bahar aana hai. Koi raasta hai kya shant hone ka abhi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offers quick, culturally appropriate grounding options to break the emotional freeze before the children arrive.
text: Iss bhaari pan ko thoda kam karne ke liye, kya tum abhi ek glass thanda pani pee kar wapas aana chahogi, ya phir bas do minute wahi baithe-baithe lambi saans lekar apne hath aur pair thode stretch karna behtar lagega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main paani pee leti hoon. (drinks water). Thoda sa theek toh laga. But the moment I think about Mummy's words, flood of emotions phir se mind me freeze kar deta hai sab kuch.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walks through a grounding exercise step by step.
text: Pehle yeh karo… apne dono paon ko zameen par flat rakho aur dhyan wahan lagao… phir ek gehri saans andar lo aur bahut dheere se chhod do… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay... (breathing). Zameen par paon rakhne se actually thoda grounded feel ho raha hai. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki apne body ko feel karna hi bhool jati hoon aisi tension mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframes the freeze response as structural and natural rather than personal failure.
text: Aise 'log kya kahenge' wale taano ko sunkar freeze ho jana ek bilkul natural response hai tumhari body ka, yeh tumhari koi kamzori nahi balki salon ke is structural pressure aur thakan ka nateeja hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you for saying that. Mujhe lag raha tha main pagal ho rahi hoon ya just ek nakara maa hoon jo apne rights ke liye khadi bhi nahi ho sakti bina overwhelm hue.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirms her inherent strength in wanting to fight for her rights.
text: Apne hak aur bacchon ke future ke liye akele aawaz uthane ka sochna hi apne aap mein bohot badi himmat ki baat hai, khaaskar tab jab pura mahol aur khandaan khilaaf khada ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek kone mein baithi hoon
text: Himmat toh dikhani padegi bacchon ke liye. Unki padhai ka kharcha aur future meri zimmedari hai. Par aaj mere andar bilkul taqat nahi hai kisi property dispute pe dobara bahas karne ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the conflict between her duty as a mother and her deep exhaustion using Lens B.
text: Ek akele parent hone ke farz mein bacchon ka future secure karna aur andar ki is behisaab thakan ke beech mein tum ek chota sa pause lena chahti ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aaj koi bahas nahi. Main bas ab yahan se uthkar kitchen jaungi aur unka favourite snack banaungi. Unka science ka exam hai kal, I'll just sit with them to study.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asks how engaging with her children will impact her internal emotional flood.
text: Bacchon ko padhane ke bahane unke paas baith kar unka favourite khana banana, yeh chota sa kadam tumhare andar chal rahe is toofan ko aaj kitni shanti de paayega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Unko padhte dekh kar aur unke sawal answer karke dhyan shift hoga mera. Wo mera anchor hain. Unki wajah se hi toh ye flood of emotions sahan kar rahi hoon main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the calming effect of her children's presence using Lens F.
text: Unke masoom chehron ko dekh kar aur unke routine mein wapas lag kar, andar ki woh darr aur akelepan ki bechaini thodi si raahat mein badal jaati hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek kone mein baithi hoon
text: Yes. Unke bina toh mera wajood hi khatam lagta hai. I will make sure unhe meri is sad state ka asar na pade. Aaj sirf unki studies pe focus karungi aur kone mein rona band karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirms her resilience in prioritizing her children despite emotional pain.
text: Ek maa ki tarah apni khud ki takleef ko ek taraf rakh kar unki padhai ko sabse upar rakhna, yeh saaf zahir karta hai ki tum andar se kitni majboot aur suljhi hui ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Izzat mitti mein mil gayi lagti thi subah tak, but meri asli izzat toh mere bacche hain. Agar wo padh likh gaye, toh inke 'log kya kahenge' wale taane matter nahi karenge kabhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframes 'izzat' systematically, pulling it away from societal judgment and tying it to her own truth.
text: Yeh samajh lena ki tumhari izzat logo ke tano aur property se nahi balki tumhari apni mehnat aur bacchon ki parvarish se judi hai, samaj ki is khokhli soch ko todne ka sabse bada kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho aap. Main kal dobara theek se sochungi ki legal advice leni hai ya nahi. Aaj ka din main sirf emotional flood se recover hone ke liye lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the protective choice to delay big decisions to conquer the immediate fear (Lens E).
text: Aaj raat sirf apni thakan mita kar aur bade faislo ko kal par chhod kar, tum us darr aur ghabrahat ko aage badhne se rok rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, I will stop the panic today. Main itni zyada overwhelmed thi start mein but ab ek clear aur shant rasta dikh raha hai aage badhne ka. Main ab bacchon ko dekhti hoon. Shukriya baat sunne ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirms her proactive move toward her children and acknowledges her success in handling the overwhelm.
text: Jao bacchon ko dekho, tumne aaj apni bhaari feeling ko pehchaan kar khud ko jis tarah wapas sambhala hai, woh tumhare andar ki behtareen taqat ki sabse badi jeet hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas ghut rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Main bas ghut rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai. Kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai, bas ek ajeeb sa darr baith gaya hai dimaag mein aur saans phool rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling quality of the emotional flooding without focusing on a specific stressor yet.
text: Sun ke lag raha hai ki ek aisi ghabrahat ne gher liya hai jahan saans lena bhi mushkil ho raha hai aur sab kuch sunn pad gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas ghut rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Haan, bilkul sunn pad gaya hai. Raat bhar neend nahi aayi, bas rona aa raha tha. Samajh nahi aa raha ki meri zindagi ka kya hoga, main bas ghut rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the duration and exhausting nature of staying awake with this anxiety.
text: Poori raat is bechaini aur rone ke beech jagte rehna, sach mein andar tak thaka dene wala hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak hi gayi hoon. Asal mein raat ko ladaai hui thi. Papa ne bol diya ki sasural se wapas aane ke baad maine khandaan ki naak kata di hai, isliye ab bhai hi waris hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue with a soft, shorter reflection ending in a pause.
text: Apne hi papa se yeh sunna ki ab aapki jagah us ghar mein nahi rahi...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas ghut rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Wahi toh! Meri asli takleef koi nahi samajh raha. Ek toh meri wahan shadi toot gayi, upar se yahan apne hi ghar mein paraya kar diya mujhe. Aisa lagta hai main bas ghut rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question to explore her internal experience of this dual rejection.
text: Jab ek taraf sasural ka dukh aur doosri taraf apne hi mayke mein paraya hone ka ehsaas milta hai, toh akele mein yeh ghabrahat kaisi lagti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai ki main kahin ki nahi rahi. Na wahan mera koi haq tha, aur ab yahan Papa ne bhai ko waris bana kar bata diya ki betiyan bas bojh hoti hain. Andar se lagta hai ki meri koi aukaat hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the unexpressed quiet resignation from the intersection of Marriage Pressure and Sequential coping.
text: Lagta hai dono taraf se thukraye jaane ke baad, ab aage kuch theek hone ki umeed hi khatam ho chuki hai aur ek bohot gehri, shaant nirasha ne jagah le li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Umeed toh kab ki toot chuki hai. Jab sasural mein itna kuch saha, socha tha Papa thoda sahaara denge. Par yahan toh biradari aur 'log kya kahenge' ki fikr zyada hai meri zindagi se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Follow stigma cue rules with a gentle reflection of the relational betrayal ending in a soft pause.
text: Jis sahare ki apeksha aapko apne parivaar se thi, wahan samaj ki fikar aapke dard se badi ho gayi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur ab main kis haq se yahan rahoon? Bhai-bhabhi bhi mujhe waise hi dekhte hain jaise main unke hisse par baithi hoon. Koi mujhse theek se baat tak nahi karta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her need for support as culturally normal while separating her worth from her family's discriminatory behavior.
text: Aise waqt mein apne hi gharwalon se sahare aur haq ki umeed karna bilkul jayaz hai. Aksar humare samaj mein shadi tootne par betiyon ko akela chhod diya jata hai, par unka yeh bhedbhav aapki apni keemat ko kabhi kam nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Keemat toh meri kuch rahi hi nahi. Mere dimaag mein bas ye ghoomta rehta hai ki aage meri poori zindagi aise hi taane sunte hue guzregi. Koi aur rasta hi nahi bacha mere paas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote about inheritance and stigma to normalise her situation.
text: Ek beti ke roop mein aisi paristhiti ka samna karna aur usko property ya izzat se bedakhal karna bahut common pattern hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki biradari ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye biradari hi toh sabse bada rog hai. Isi chakkar mein meri puri shanti tabah ho gayi. Par ab kabhi kabhi lagta hai, aakhir kab tak main aise rote hue apni kismat ko koste rahungi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time duration of her exhaustion as she gets closer to readiness.
text: Itne lambe waqt se is dard aur apmaan ko rote hue sehne ke baad, ab andar kahin ek thakawat si ho rahi hai is boj ko uthate uthate.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot thak chuki hoon. Ye aansu ab sookh gaye hain, bas ghabrahat bachi hai jo kam hone ka naam nahi leti. Main aage aisi bekaar zindagi nahi jeena chahti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask a question to explicitly check for her readiness to shift towards action and finding relief.
text: Is andhere aur ghutan ke beech, kya aapke andar kahin yeh aawaz aa rahi hai ki ab apne sukoon ke liye thoda sa raasta dhundha jaye?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main theek hona chahti hoon is andhere se. Par mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka. Aap hi batao ab kya karoon ki ye darr thoda kam ho aur main theek se saans le saku?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer two brief, completing, duty-compatible options for grounding.
text: Aapka yeh sochna aur himmat jutana sach mein bohot badi baat hai. Kya aaj din mein hum do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain? Pehla, jab sab dopahar mein aaram kar rahe ho toh 10 minute akele baith kar apni saans par dhyan dena, ya phir dusra, ek purani diary mein apne darr aur gusse ko likh kar nikal dena. Inme se kya theek lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar mein shanti toh dopahar ko hi hoti hai. Saans lene par dhyan dena thoda ajeeb lagta hai mujhe. Main diary mein likhne ki koshish kar sakti hoon. Kisi ko pata nahi chalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the diary suggestion step by step.
text: Yeh bilkul theek rahega. Pehle dopahar mein jab kamre mein koi na ho, ek copy aur pen lijiye... phir jo bhi baatein aur darr andar ghut rahe hain, unko bas panno par likh dijiye... aur phir copy aaraam se chupakar rakh dijiye, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main ye karungi. Par likhte waqt agar phir se woh sasural wali ladaai ya papa ki baatein yaad aayi aur rona aaya toh? Darr lagta hai ki kahin main aawaz nikal kar rone na lag jaaun aur log 'drama' bol de.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of crying and facing more stigma.
text: Man halka karte waqt, andar daba hua woh poora gussa aur dukh kahin aansuon ke zariye bahar aakar doosron ko na dikh jaye, yeh darr abhi bhi roke hue hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan kyunki agar papa ne mujhe rote hue dekh liya toh bolenge ki drama kar rahi hai taaki sympathy mile. Main aur taane nahi sun sakti unke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Follow stigma cue rule with a short relational reflection ending in a pause.
text: Apne haq ke aansu bahane ko bhi jab natak ka naam de diya jata hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas ghut rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Isiliye maine apne aansu andar hi andar daba liye hain. Bas isiliye main bas ghut rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai kabhi kabhi. Par ab likhna theek lagega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe that weaponizing tears as 'drama' is a structural tool, not her flaw.
text: Yahan yeh janna zaroori hai ki betiyon ko aawaz uthane ya rone par 'taane' ya 'natak' bolna, ek purana tareeka hai unko chup rakhne ka, isme aapke dard ki koi galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main samajh rahi hoon ab. Ye unki soch ka chotapan hai, meri galti nahi. Main chupchap likhungi, apne liye. Unko nahi samjhana mujhe kuch.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her strength in choosing her own peace over their understanding.
text: Apne dard ko doosron ko samjhane ki apeksha chhod kar, khud ko sukoon dene ka yeh nirnay lena aapki bahut badi andaruni taqat dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pata nahi taqat hai ya bas thakawat. Par haan, ab is ghar walon ke taano ko apne upar itna haavi nahi hone dungi. Apna khayal toh khud hi rakhna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her shift from expecting external support to focusing on herself.
text: Auron se ummeed rakhne wale farz se hat kar, ab aapne apna poora dhyan apne khud ke sukoon aur bhalai par laga diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zaroori ho gaya hai ye. Warna ye log toh 'khandaan ki naak' aur 'waris' ke chakkar mein mujhe jeete ji maar denge. Main aaj diary dhoondhti hoon purane samaan mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an exploratory question to ground her action plan.
text: Jab aapko woh diary mil jayegi aur aap pehla shabd likhne baithngi, toh kaun si ek baat hai jise aap sabse pehle usme azaad karna chahengi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main likhungi ki main kisi ki jageer nahi hoon, aur na hi meri izzat meri shadi se judi thi. Mera wajood inke diye hue haq se bada hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational boundary she is establishing within her own mind.
text: Apni pehchaan ko in rishton ki bandishon aur inke tano se alag karke, ek khuli hawa mein saans lene ki azaadi si mehsus ho rahi hai is khayal mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur ye azaadi ab mujhse koi nahi cheen sakta. Aapke saath baat karke dimaag thoda saaf hua hai. Andhera ab bhi hai, par ab ghutan kam lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her clarity and courage to wrap up the conversation on an encouraging note.
text: Yeh saaf dimaag aur yeh nayi himmat, aapke hi andar thi. Aaj aapne apne sukoon ke liye jo rasta chuna hai, uske liye aap sach mein bohot badhai ki haqdaar hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas sunn hokar leti hoon aaj kal. Main itni toot chuki hoon ki na bhook lag rahi hai na pyaas, bas ek gehra dard mehsus ho raha hai. Is waqt main koi solution dhoondne ke layak hi nahi bachi, bas lag raha hai ki main sabke liye ek bojh ban gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens F to mirror the feeling of complete emotional flooding and numbness, avoiding rushing to the stressor.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki andar ek lamba andhera cha gaya hai, aur us bhaari dard ne aapko is waqt poori tarah se gher liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, andar se ekdum khali ho chuki hoon. Aankhon se aansu bhi nahi nikalte ab. Bas bistar par sunn hokar leti hoon, aur dimaag mein ajeeb sa sannata aur shor ek sath rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to reflect the prolonged duration and the exhausting mental state she is carrying.
text: Itne lambe waqt se is akelepan aur dimaag ki uljhan ko uthate uthate, tumhara dil aur dimaag dono bilkul thak se gaye hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak toh gayi hoon sach mein. Aaj papa ne sari registry bhai ke naam kar di aur mujhe bola ki meri shadi mein pehle hi itna dowry diya tha jo ab barbaad ho gaya. Mera wajood hi kuch nahi raha inke aage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational rejection from her father following the stigma cue, ending with a soft pause.
text: Jab apne hi pita aisi baat kahein aur haq chheen kar paraya kar dein, toh saans lena bhi mushkil ho jata hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Main apne hi ghar mein mehmaan se bhi gayi guzri ban gayi hoon. Meri shadi tootne ka poora dosh mujhe de diya, jaise meri koi izzat ya feelings hi na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question based on her words to explore the pain of being blamed and losing respect.
text: Jis ghar mein bachpan beeta, wahan se aisi parayi feeling aur izzat par uthte sawal ko aap andar hi andar kaise jhel rahi hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Jhelna kya hai, koi sunne wala toh hai nahi. Bhai bhabhi bhi har baat par taane maarte hain. Mujhe lagta hai saari zindagi aise hi inki baatein sunkar rona padega. Ek zinda laash ban ke reh gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of spending her whole life listening to these taunts.
text: Tumhe is baat ka gehra darr aur takleef hai ki shayad ab aage ki poori zindagi aise hi taanon ke beech, bina kisi apne ke guzar jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yahi lagta hai... ki ab meri koi ehmiyat nahi bachi is duniya mein. Dowry barbaad hone ka thappa lag gaya hai mujh par. Main andar se bilkul haar chuki hoon, isliye bas sunn hokar leti hoon chupchap.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the unexpressed emotion of quiet resignation per the C3+Sequential coping matrix rule.
text: In sab baaton ko lagatar sunkar aur apno ki berukhi dekh kar, lagta hai tumhare andar ek quiet resignation aa gaya hai, jaise ab ummeed karne ya aawaz uthane ki taqat hi khatam ho gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne bilkul theek samjha. Ab kis se ladun main? Papa ke liye toh main bas ek fail hui investment ban ke reh gayi. Biradari kya kahegi, unko bas is baat ki fikar rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings culturally while separating her true self-worth from the community's judgment about dowry and marriage.
text: Jo haar aur nirasha tum abhi mehsoos kar rahi ho, woh bilkul jayaz hai kyunki humare yahan betiyon ko aksar unki shadi aur dahej se tolte hain. Lekin yaad rakhna, biradari aur parivar ki yeh soch tumhari asali keemat ya tumhara wajood tay nahi karti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kehne aur sunne mein toh yeh theek lagta hai, par haqeeqat yahi hai ki mera koi apna nahi raha. Main poori tarah akeli aur bekaar ho chuki hoon is char deewari mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Briefly disclosing a systemic reality to normalize her experience and reduce her sense of isolation.
text: Humare samaj mein shadi tootne par betiyon ke sath aisi kadwahat aur bedakhli bohot common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka dard nahi hai yeh, lekin koi bahar bolega nahi kyunki sabko panchayat aur izzat ka sawal lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Izzat ki aadh mein yeh log humari toh jaan nikal lete hain. Main sach mein aise roz ghut-ghut ke nahi jeena chahti. Batao main kya karoon ab? Yeh dimaag ka bhaari pan aur shor kaise kam karun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, actionable steps that fit her current low energy to help break the immediate overwhelm.
text: Jab andar itna bhaari pan aur ghutan ho, toh hum do chote raste apna sakte hain aaj ke liye: ya toh aap apne kamre ki khidki thodi der khol kar sirf bahar ki hawa ko thodi der mehsoos karein, ya phir ek glass paani ghoont-ghoont karke piyein dhyan se.

speaker: Seeker
text: Khidki toh band hi rakhti hoon main din bhar... shayad thodi dhoop aur hawa aane doon andar toh thoda theek lage. Par abhi himmat nahi ho rahi bistar se uthne ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking the seeker step by step through the process of opening the window to break the physical numbness.
text: Pehle apne bistar par aaram se dhakkel kar baith jao... phir dheere se chalkar khidki ka ek chota sa palla thoda sa kholo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine thodi si khidki kholi hai abhi. Bahar ki hawa toh acchi lag rahi hai chehre par, thodi roshni bhi aayi kamre mein. Par dimag se wo registry aur dowry wali baat nikal nahi rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe to shift the blame of the dowry comment from her personal worth to the parents' structural anxiety.
text: Aksar gharwale apne samajik darr aur paise ke nuksan ka saara stress aur gussa beti par haq jatakar nikalte hain—yeh unki apni inabilities aur helplessness ka nateeja hai, na ki iska ki tum sach mein ek bojh ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unka jo bhi darr ho, par saza toh mujhe hi mil rahi hai na har din. Main toh ab kisi se milna, bahar jaakar baithna bhi avoid karti hoon ghar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational withdrawal to protect herself.
text: Ghar walon ki inhi teekhi baaton se bachne ke liye, tumne khud ko apne hi parivar se bilkul alag-thalag aur band kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar galti se bhi samne jaungi toh fir wahi dowry barbaad hone ka naya taana milega. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai main yahan theek se saans bhi nahi le pa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens F to mirror the feeling of being suffocated and overwhelmed by the constant pressure.
text: Yeh sab baatein tumhare seene par ek pathar ki tarah baith gayi hain, jisse andar hi andar bohot zyada ghutan hoti hai har waqt.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha bilkul. Aisa lagta hai ki maine apni puri shanti kho di hai. Main toh bas sunn hokar leti hoon ki kam se kam meri wajah se ghar mein koi aur naya kalesh na shuru ho jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of causing more fights, showing why she goes numb.
text: Naye jhagde aur tamashe ke shuru hone ke darr se, tumne apni saari takleef ko ek dum khamoshi mein daba diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par is khamoshi ne mujhe andar se aur khokhla kar diya hai. Mujhe lagta tha ki chup rahungi toh papa shayad thoda samajh jayenge meri takleef ko. Par aisa kuch nahi hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassuring her that her silence was a survival strategy and valid, not a weakness.
text: Tumhara yeh sochna ki chup rehkar rishte bach jayenge aur wo tumhe samjhenge, ek bohot natural umeed thi. Tumhara chup rehna tumhari kamzori nahi, balki is mushkil mahol mein bache rehne ka ek tareeka raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki in baaton se thoda sukoon mil raha hai mujhe aaj. Kam se kam koi toh bina judge kiye sun raha hai mujhe. Kya main is andhere aur sunn pan se kabhi poori tarah bahar nikal paungi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror her emerging hope after a long period of suffering.
text: Is lambe safar aur gehre thakan ke baad, ab tumhare andar phir se theek hone aur roshni dekhne ki ek chahat jag rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main waqai theek hona chahti hoon. Bhale hi papa ne mera koi haq nahi rakha yahan, par main apni zindagi ko aage aise hi bedakhli aur akelepan mein nahi jeena chahti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggesting long-term low-effort possibilities for building self-worth independently.
text: Aage chalkar khud ko sambhalne ke do aur chote raste soche ja sakte hain: ya toh hum roz diary mein apni bhadas likhne ki aadat daalein bina kisi ke darr ke, ya phir dheere-dheere apni khud ki koi choti aamdani ka zariya shuru karne ke baare mein sochein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aamdani wali baat theek lag rahi hai thodi. Agar main khud ke pairon par khadi ho gayi, toh kam se kam paise ke liye unki mohtaj nahi rahungi aur unka yeh taana nahi sunna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror her emerging desire to break out of the dependent role and claim independence.
text: Apne pairo par khade hokar, tum is lachaar aur mohtaj beti wali pehchaan ko todkar, ek nayi aur azaad pehchaan banana chahti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi kaha. Main sach mein ye jo har din sunn hokar leti hoon, is aadat se bahar aana chahti hoon. Bahut waqt aur aansu barbaad kar liye maine apne aap ko kamzor maan kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing structural information to validate how financial independence chips away at societal labels of worthlessness.
text: Jab auratein apni financial choti shuruaat karti hain, toh unka apne wajood par control wapas aane lagta hai, aur samaj ka banaya hua yeh 'bojh' hone ka darr dheere-dheere tut jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunkar kaafi himmat aayi hai mujh mein. Kam se kam ab dimaag mein ek choti si ummeed dikh rahi hai. Main abhi khidki ke paas aur thodi der baithungi sukoon se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Concluding by affirming her choice to take small steps for her own peace.
text: Aaj in mushkil halaton ke beech apni khidki kholna aur apne sukoon ke liye ek kadam uthana, tumhare andar ki chupi hui taqat aur jeene ki chaah ko bahut khoobsurti se dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon
text: Mera dil itni buri tarah toot gaya hai ki bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi, dimaag mein bas ajeeb se taane goonj rahe hain. Main poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon, samajh hi nahi aa raha ki is joint family mein ab mera kya wajood bacha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize mild risk, then mirror the feeling quality of the overwhelm without rushing to the facts (Lens F).
text: Is tarah ki thakan aur dard hona bilkul normal hai jab dimaag itna bhari ho. Aisa lag raha hai ki andar bas ek bohot gehra dukh aur helpless si feeling bhar gayi hai, jismein apne hi wajood par sawal uthne lage hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon
text: Bilkul waisa hi lag raha hai. Pata nahi main kyu zinda hoon ya kiske liye. Main poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon, aur ab lagta hai jaise main bas ek bojh hoon jiski koi izzat nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue with a soft, short restatement focused on the duration/weight of the feeling, ending in a soft pause.
text: Itne samay se is bojh aur bina izzat ke ehsaas ko apne akele pan mein jhelna, sach mein bohot thaka dene wala lagta hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur kal raat ki bahas ke baad toh hadd hi ho gayi. Bhai ne saaf keh diya ki ab mera is ghar par koi haq nahi kyunki mera rishta toot chuka hai. Apne hi bhai ke muh se aisi baat sunkar sab khatam sa lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Now that the stressor has surfaced, mirror the deep relational betrayal.
text: Jis bhai se ummeed thi ki wo is mushkil waqt mein sath dega, usi ne jab ghar aur haq se is tarah alag kar diya, toh yeh rishte ka tootna aur zyada chubhne lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon
text: Chubhta toh hai. Un taanon ke baad lagta hai ki main bas is ghar mein padhi hui ek extra cheez hoon. Main poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon aur andar se ekdum khali ho chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question based on her feeling of emptiness to transition towards Insight.
text: Is ghar mein khud ko sirf ek extra cheez ki tarah mehsoos karte hue, andar jo yeh khaalipan aa gaya hai, usmein aage ke baare mein kya chal raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kuch chal hi nahi raha ab. Mann mein ek chup si lag gayi hai. Unse haq mangne ka ya ladne ka koi fayda nahi. Main bas sehti rahungi jab tak yahan hoon, aur koi rasta bhi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the core feeling of quiet resignation arising from family pressure and sequential coping.
text: Lagta hai ki in sab taanon aur apno se mili chot ke baad ek quiet resignation aa gayi hai, jahan tumne ladne ya ummeed rakhne ki jagah is dard ko khamoshi se sehne ko hi aakhiri rasta maan liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Jab apni hi joint family paraya kar de, toh awaz apne aap nikalna band ho jati hai. Mere ansu bhi ab sookh gaye hain, par dimaag mein main emotional flooding ka shikar hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her silence as a normal response to rejection in joint families, separating her worth from their judgment.
text: Apni hi joint family mein jab ek toote rishte ke baad is tarah paraya feel karwaya jata hai, toh aisi khamoshi aur dard hona bilkul swabhavik hai. Par samaj aur parivaar ke yeh unfair taane tumhari asli value ya tumhare jeene ke haq ko kabhi kam nahi karte.

speaker: Seeker
text: Value kya hai meri ab? Rishtedar jab aate hain toh aise dekhte hain jaise main koi daag hoon. Ek aurat jiska pati use chhod de, uska is biradari mein wese hi koi samman nahi bachta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handle stigma cue with a short restatement focusing on the feared consequence, ending softly.
text: Dusron ki in chubhney wali nazaron aur baton se apna samman bilkul khatam ho jane ka jo darr hai, wo andar tak baith gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon
text: Haan, bas yahi darr khata rehta hai dimaag ko. Main poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon aur is ghar ki diwarein mujhe ghutan deti hain. Mujhe sach mein nahi pata ab kya karoon is feeling se bachne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 simple, small-step options to break the immediate paralysis now that the readiness signal is given.
text: Jab diwarein itni ghutan dene lagein, toh ek chota kadam turant shanti de sakta hai. Hum do cheezein try kar sakte hain abhi: pehla, dreere se bed se uth kar thoda paani pee kar khidki ke paas 5 minute khade ho jana. Ya dusra, apne man ki is bhari-pan ko ek diary ke panne par thoda sa likh dena. Tumhe inmein se abhi kya karna theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Likhne ki himmat toh meri abhi nahi ho rahi, pata nahi hath kanpenge mere. Paani peene aur khidki ke paas jaane wali baat shayad main kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen suggestion step-by-step.
text: Theek hai, bilkul aaram se karte hain. Pehle dreere se bed se uth kar paani ka ek ghoont piyo... phir bas khidki ke paas ja kar bahar ki taraf ek gehri saans lo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye. Jab khidki ke paas ho, toh mujhe batana.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main khidki ke paas aayi hoon. Bahar thodi hawa chal rahi hai. Aise khule mein dekh kar, wo jo andar se completely suffocate ho raha tha, wo thoda theek lag raha hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalise her suffocation as structural, stemming from rigid joint family norms.
text: Bahar ki hawa aate hi saans ka behtar hona dikhata hai ki andar ki ghutan tumhari kisi kami se nahi thi. Yeh joint family system mein toote hue rishton ko lekar jo kathor niyam aur soch hai, asal mein wahi is ghutan aur dabav ki wajah hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sach keh rahe hain. Unke niyam itne sakht hain ki aurat ko bojh hi samajhte hain. Pehle main poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon, yahi soch kar khud ko kosti thi ki mujhme hi koi galti hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote to normalise her absorbing the blame.
text: Apne ghar walo ke taanon ko khud ki kami aur galti samajh lena joint family wali auraton mein bahut common pattern hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein izzat aur rishton ki shanti banaye rakhne ka sara dabaav unhi par hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bachpan se yahi sikhaya gaya ki aurat ko hi chup rehna chahiye. Bhai ne kal mera haq chheena, tab bhi maine uski jagah khud ko hi galat maana ki shayad shadi tooti toh main wajood hi kho baithi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how her conditioned role made her absorb the injustice.
text: Apne haq aur rights ko chod kar, chup rehne aur har galti ka bojh khud par lene ki jo conditioning bachpan se mili thi, usne hi kal ke us injustice ko bhi normalise karne pe majboor kar diya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin ab mujhe is dabaav ko samajhna padega. Agar main aise hi akele bed par roti rahi, toh woh log mujhe aur dabayenge. Mujhe thoda theek hokar sochna hoga apne aage ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational shift from absorbing blame to wanting to stand strong.
text: Unke dabaav ke aage sirf rone ke bajaye, ab apne khud ke wajood ko sambhalne aur unki is zyadati ke khilaf ek naya hausla tumhare andar aane laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon
text: Hausla ban raha hai dreere dreere. Kal tak toh main poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon wahi lagta tha, par aapse baat karke ab lag raha hai ki mera zinda rehna unke taanon par depend nahi karta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and contrast from yesterday's despair to today's emerging hope.
text: Kal raat ki us gehri nirasha aur ghabrahat se nikal kar, aaj ab in chote kadmon se apne astitva ki nayi samajh banna, apne aap mein ek bahut bada badlaav hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main ab unse ja kar uljhungi nahi, unko taane maarne hain maarne do. Main thoda padhi likhi hoon, shayad aas paas ke bacchon ko tution padhana start kar du taaki mere paas thode khud ke paise aane lagein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her practical step towards financial independence, highlighting her agency.
text: Uljhanon mein energy waste karne ki jagah apne padhai aur skills ko use karke tuition shuru karne ka yeh vichar bahut hi practical hai. Aise kadam uthana tumhari khud ki mehnat aur qabiliyat par bharosa dikhata hai, jo in tamaam baton se kahin zyada bada hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Agar main apne pairo par thoda bhi khadi ho gayi, toh bhai ya kisi aur ko haq ke baare mein dabane ka mauka hi nahi milega. Ye mera pehla step hoga apni shanti wapas paane ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her claiming a new empowering role as an independent earner.
text: Ghar walon ki daya par depend rehne ke bajaye, apne dum par izzat aur self-respect kamane ki yeh zimmedari ab apne hatho mein lena bohot empowering hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, I agree. Yeh soch kar hi ajeeb si shanti mil rahi hai. Mujhe ab wapas poori tarah emotional flooding wale us helpless zone mein nahi jaana. Main abhi chalkar mu-hath dhoti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her desire to protect herself from returning to that overwhelmed state.
text: Wapas us helpless aur doobne wale ehsaas mein girne ka darr ab kafi kam ho gaya hai, aur uski jagah apne aap ko sambhalne ki is koshish ne le li hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, aur aapse baat karke sach mein lag raha hai ki koi toh hai jo meri situation samajh raha hai bina mujhe judge kiye ya meri galti nikale.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a closing systemic reframe about seeking support.
text: Jab aas paas poori family bas judgements aur taane dene lage, toh kisi se bina darre baat kar pana aur apna bojh share karna, mind ko shanti dene ka ek bahut hi zaroori hissa ban jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot zaruri tha yeh. Aaj aapne meri bahut badi madad ki hai mujhe khidki tak lane mein. Main ab apne aage ke raste ke bare mein aaram se baith kar sochungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the shift from the beginning of the conversation to the present.
text: Kuch der pehle ke us bed se na uth paane ke dard se lekar, ab khidki par aakar aage ke raste ko plan karne tak ka safar, aage ka ek bada kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon
text: Thank you so much. Aur aage jab bhi lagta hai ki main poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon, main is khidki waale aur paani peene wale idea ko zaroor yaad rakhungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final reinforcement of her strength and resilience.
text: Apne liye yeh naya rasta nikalna aur apne emotions ko sambhalne ki takat dhoondhna sach mein tumhari asli majbooti dikhata hai. Agar kabhi dimaag mein taane badhne lagein, toh yaad rakhna ki tum khud is situation ko face karne ke qabil ho, apna dhyan rakhna.
